title: Holey Pressure Plates
description: Puts a hole in the middle of every type of pressure plate. Optimal for ice boat racing!
body:
# Holey Pressure Plates

![Lineup of all pressure plates with the resource pack enabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e512cca9734cd74d85edc3dfc35ab1c1827dc487.png)

## Why?
- Extends the ability to see whats under the pressure plate
- Can be used for Ice Boat Racing, in case you dont want pressure plates completely hidden
